name: Stained Glass Candies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate and stir in the sugar.
2. Add the beaten egg to the melted chocolate mixture.
3. Spread the mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, adding chopped nuts and marshmallows on top.
4. Use wax paper to roll up the mixture into tight logs.
5. Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes until firm.
6. Once cooled, slice the logs into round candies using a sharp knife.
7. Serve and enjoy your colorful stained glass candies!
